_meta.title: State-handler dispatch table PTR_FUN_802d3570 -> animation (group, slot) map
_meta.summary: The 35-slot function-pointer table at 0x802d3570 (three views: +0x540 full, +0x591 = +0x540-4, +0x6fe = +0x540-9). Each slot is a per-frame state handler. Handlers that visibly select a new animation call the bank setter zz_004beb8_ (0x8004beb8), either directly or through the thin wrapper zz_005f188_ (0x8005f188). This file records, per slot, the (bank, group/subtable, slot) constants passed at the actual call site with chunk:line evidence.
_meta.table_structure_source: behavior-notes.md lines 1163-1199 (prior session; 35-slot table dump, addresses raw-ROM confirmed). This file ADDS the resolved (group,slot) animation each handler plays.

anim_setter.name: zz_004beb8_
anim_setter.signature_ghidra: void zz_004beb8_(double rate, int actor, uint limbMask, uint groupSel, int slot, uint startFrame, uint endFrame)

arg_semantics.rate: playback/blend rate float (FLOAT_80437464 typical, FLOAT_804374e8 for react)
arg_semantics.actor: borg actor pointer (param_1 of the handler)
arg_semantics.limbMask: arg3 (0xf / 0xd / 2) is a per-limb CHANNEL mask ANDed with actor+0x579 (line 1441), looped over 4 channels (line 1481). NOT the animation group. 0xf = all 4 channels.
arg_semantics.groupSel: arg4 = the BANK/GROUP selector. Bit 0x80 chooses which loaded anim-DAT root pointer to index: (arg4 & 0x80)==0 -> uses actor+0x1d80 (line 1446); set -> uses actor+0x1d84 (line 1464). The low 7 bits (arg4 & 0x7f) index a per-group short table inside that DAT (lines 1461 / 1476). arg4==0 defaults the group to actor+0x582 (line 1459).
arg_semantics.slot: arg5 = the SLOT (sub-action / action-id) index within the selected group: sVar1 = *(short*)(iVar2 + slot*2) (line 1479). Written to channel state at line 1484.
arg_semantics.startFrame_endFrame: 0xffffffff/0xffffffff = play whole clip; explicit values = frame window.

group_axis_mapping.note: The ROM addresses anims as (dat_root, group7bit, slot). actor+0x1d80 and actor+0x1d84 are two loaded animation-DAT roots set per-borg-type at model load (default DAT_802bf040 / DAT_802bc080 in chunk_0010.c:135-136; overridden per borg in chunk_0029/0033/0046/0049/0050/0052). The mot.bin master-table 'group' axis in research/format-specs/borg-animation-banks.md (g0=locomotion, g1=attack, g3=damage, g4=knockdown, g5=death) is applied at load; the handler constants give the group7bit (subtable) and slot directly. Movement family uses groupSel 0x80 (=subtable 0 = locomotion/group 0); attack family uses 0x81 (=subtable 1 = attack/group 1); some use 0x82 (=subtable 2).
group_axis_mapping.subtable_0: groupSel 0x80 or 0 (default actor+0x582, which is 0 or 1 by borg type; chunk_0009.c:4093-4101). Maps to mot GROUP 0 = locomotion (idle/move/dash/turn). CONFIRMED by slot values matching the g0 slot convention (idle=0, move=1, dash=2-5).
group_axis_mapping.subtable_1: groupSel 0x81. Attack/hit-react bank (mot GROUP 1 = attack per spec).
group_axis_mapping.subtable_2: groupSel 0x82. Third bank (used by attack-windup slots 22/23).

anim_setter_wrapper.name: zz_005f188_
anim_setter_wrapper.signature: void zz_005f188_(int actor, char groupSel, char slot)
anim_setter_wrapper.behavior: If the requested (groupSel,slot) already matches the currently playing clip (actor+0x1d0c/+0x1d0d) it either advances (zz_004cd24_) or re-issues; otherwise it calls zz_004beb8_(FLOAT_80437464, actor, 0xf, groupSel, slot, -1, -1). Effectively 'play (group=groupSel&0x7f, slot) unless already playing it.' Used by the movement/turn/attack-startup handlers. groupSel -0x80 = 0x80 = subtable 0; -0x7f = 0x81 = subtable 1.

anim_advancer.name: zz_004cd24_
anim_advancer.behavior: Per-frame ADVANCE of the currently-playing clip on the given channel mask (0xf). Returns completion (sets +0x1d0e when a channel finishes). Does NOT select a new (group,slot). Called by nearly every handler to step the active anim.

table_range: 0x802d3570 .. 0x802d35f8 (raw-ROM confirmed prior session; slot 35+ is non-code data DAT_802d35fc onward)

slots.name: FUN_8005be08
slots.evidence: Deploy drop-in phase 0. Counts +0x558 timer down, no zz_004beb8_/zz_005f188_ call. Spawn pose is not selected via this table.

slots.name: FUN_8005bec8
slots.evidence: Deploy phase 1. Calls dispatch_slot_action_update(actor,2) (chunk_0007.c:3841) which is an AI/match slot dispatch (chunk_0008.c:4373), NOT an animation call. No bank anim selected.

slots.name: FUN_8005bf6c
slots.evidence: Deploy phase 2 (landing). Timer countdown + flag clears, no zz_004beb8_ call.

slots.name: FUN_8005bfec
slots.evidence: Present in raw pointer table; not individually decompiled/read this session.

slots.name: FUN_8005c4a4
slots.evidence: One-line wrapper: calls zz_005f00c_(actor) (0x8005f00c, chunk_0007.c:5744), the IDLE decision handler. zz_005f00c_ does NOT set an anim; it computes next +0x6fe (movement sub-state) from input/velocity flags and writes +0x6fe = bVar3+1 (chunk_0007.c:5790). The actual idle/move anim is then played by the resulting movement handler (slots 10-12) via zz_005f188_(actor,-0x80,dir) = group0. So slot 4 selects idle/move STATE; anim = group0 slot0 (idle) when no movement.

slots.name: FUN_8005c4c8
slots.evidence: Same zz_005f00c_ idle-decision call plus a guard-flag promotion. Anim resolved downstream = group0 locomotion.

slots.name: FUN_8005c530
slots.evidence: idle-decision variant, promotes to slots 24/25. Anim resolved downstream.

slots.name: FUN_8005c5ac
slots.evidence: idle-decision variant, zz_005f00c_ only.

slots.name: FUN_8005c5d0
slots.evidence: Returns bool; enters action 4 via zz_00ea2c8_(actor,4). No zz_004beb8_ constant visible (block/guard-start; anim selected in zz_00ea2c8_ path, not read).

slots.name: FUN_8005c7f0
slots.evidence: One-liner: zz_006a474_(actor) (0x8006a474, chunk_0009.c:708) = 'return to neutral' trampoline. zz_006a474_ calls zz_006a750_(actor,0) (state transition), not an anim setter. Neutral -> idle group0 slot0 downstream.

slots.name: FUN_8005c810
slots.evidence: chunk_0007.c:4252 zz_005f188_(actor,-0x80,cVar4) where cVar4 is a 0..4 direction bucket from zz_0046510_. -0x80 => subtable 0 = group 0 (locomotion). slot 0=idle-facing/4=neutral => idle/walk/dash family. CONFIRMS group0 locomotion, direction-indexed slots.

slots.name: FUN_8005c95c
slots.evidence: chunk_0007.c:4299 zz_005f188_(actor,-0x80,(char)iVar3 + 5). group0, slots 5..8 (dash-right / jump / turn range per g0 slot convention).

slots.name: FUN_8005ca80
slots.evidence: chunk_0007.c:4349 zz_005f188_(actor,-0x80,bVar5 + 9). group0, slots 9..11 (fly/air-transition range).

slots.name: FUN_8005c7f0
slots.evidence: Duplicate pointer to slot 9 (return-to-neutral trampoline).

slots.name: FUN_8005c810
slots.evidence: Duplicate pointer to slot 10 (group0 direction locomotion).

slots.name: FUN_8005c95c
slots.evidence: Duplicate pointer to slot 11.

slots.name: FUN_8005ca80
slots.evidence: Duplicate pointer to slot 12.

slots.name: FUN_8005ca80
slots.evidence: Second duplicate of slot 12.

slots.name: zz_005cc00_
slots.evidence: chunk_0007.c:4415 zz_005f188_(actor,-0x7f,cVar4). -0x7f => subtable 1 = group 1 (attack). slot = direction bucket (cVar6, or cVar6+5 when +0x6fe!=5). Attack-startup/turn-then-commit.

slots.name: FUN_8005ce14
slots.evidence: chunk_0007.c:4520 zz_005f188_(actor,-0x7f,bVar5 + 9). group1 (attack), slots 9..11. Attack-commit follow-up (velocity atan2 turn).

slots.name: FUN_8005d0a8
slots.evidence: chunk_0007.c:4567 zz_005f188_(actor,-0x7f,cVar4 + 0xd). group1 (attack), slot 13+dir. Exits via zz_005ec04_(actor,10).

slots.name: FUN_8005d224
slots.evidence: Sets +0x720 invincibility to FLOAT_80437448 then tail-calls zz_005cc00_ (slot 18). Same group1 attack-startup anim as slot 18 with a fresh i-frame grant.

slots.name: FUN_8005d258
slots.evidence: chunk_0007.c:4615 zz_004beb8_(rate,actor,0xf,0x82,(int)*(char*)(actor+0x1d0f),-1,-1) and :4643 zz_004beb8_(...,0x82,*(char*)(actor+0x1d0f)+2,...). 0x82 => subtable 2, slot = current attack index (+0x1d0f) possibly +2. Longer attack/special windup, exits to slot 20.

slots.name: FUN_8005d494
slots.evidence: chunk_0007.c:4699 zz_004beb8_(...,0x82,*(char*)(actor+0x1d0f)+4,...); :4706 zz_004beb8_(...,0x82,*(char*)(actor+0x1cef)+4,...,0); :4738 zz_004beb8_(...,0x82,*(char*)(actor+0x1d0f)+4,...); :4746 zz_004beb8_(...,0x82,iVar3+8,...). 0x82 => subtable 2. slot depends on command-type +0x591 (branches on 1/2 and 4/5/6, direction tables DAT_80433820/28). Core melee-attack-active handler; re-arms +0x720 invincibility to FLOAT_80437448 EVERY frame (chunk_0007.c:4686).

slots.name: FUN_8005d9d8
slots.evidence: chunk_0007.c:4878 zz_004beb8_(rate,actor,0xf,0x81,*(char*)(actor+0x1cef)+0x11,-1,-1). 0x81 => subtable 1 = group 1. slot 0x11+dir. Attack-recovery/end-lag (velocity damping FLOAT_80437474).

slots.name: FUN_8005db44
slots.evidence: chunk_0007.c:4910 zz_004beb8_(rate,actor,0xf,0x80,0xd,-1,-1). 0x80 => subtable 0 = group 0. slot 0xd (13). Hit-reaction/knockback entry (snaps facing away from knockback angle +0x284, sets +0x5e0|=0x10000000).

slots.name: FUN_8005dc24
slots.evidence: chunk_0007.c:4944 zz_004beb8_(rate,actor,0xf,0x80,0xe,-1,-1). group0 slot 0xe (14). Hit-reaction variant (restores +0x50 from per-borg table).

slots.name: FUN_8005dd10
slots.evidence: chunk_0007.c:4994 zz_004beb8_(...,0x81,iVar3+0x13,...) when +0x6fe==0xf else :4997 zz_004beb8_(...,0x81,iVar3+0x17,...). 0x81 => group 1. slot 0x13/0x17 + dir. Hit-react recovery / knockdown-adjacent (+0x568 timer).

slots.name: FUN_8005dd10
slots.evidence: Duplicate pointer to slot 27.

slots.name: FUN_8005df2c
slots.evidence: chunk_0007.c:5047 zz_004beb8_(rate,actor,0xf,0x80,0xd,-1,-1). group0 slot 13. Sibling hit-react of slot 25.

slots.name: FUN_8005dffc
slots.evidence: chunk_0007.c:5109 zz_004beb8_(rate,actor,0xf,0x80,0xf,-1,-1). group0 slot 0xf (15). Full knockdown/getting-up sequence (all +0x568/56c/570 arc fields). NOTE: this is group0 slot15, distinct from the mot GROUP 4 slot 0 that the port labels 'down' (see notes (ba) caveat).

slots.name: FUN_8005e31c
slots.evidence: chunk_0007.c:5248 zz_004beb8_(rate,actor,0xf,0,0xe,0,0) (phase0) and :5213 zz_004beb8_(rate,actor,0xf,0,0xf,-1,-1) (phase2). groupSel 0 => default group actor+0x582. slots 0xe/0xf. Scripted per-borg-type landing/special-body sequence.

slots.name: FUN_8005e5a8
slots.evidence: No zz_004beb8_ call; calls zz_01ee744_(actor,0) and FUN_8005ef08. Sets +0x7de=1, gated by +0x550 countdown. Exits via zz_005ec04_(actor,5) -> +0x6fe-space slot 5 = absolute slot 14 (group0 movement). Anim, if any, is issued inside zz_01ee744_ (not read).

slots.name: FUN_8005e868
slots.evidence: No zz_004beb8_ call. Scripted matrix-transform (gnt4_PSMTXMultVec_bl) spawn/warp-entrance with arc Y-velocity; no bank anim selected via this table.

death_dispatch.note: Death runs the SAME 35-slot table indexed by +0x540. zz_005bbc0_ does not set +0x540 to a fixed death constant in its own body; +0x540 retains the borg's current slot (typically the knockdown family 30, or hit-react 25-29). The death-specific longest clip (mot group5 slot1 per borg-animation-banks.md) is NOT selected by a constant in this dispatch path in the read handlers -> death (group,slot) stays UNRESOLVED from static dispatch; only the knockdown/hit-react slots (which are group0/group1 as above) are cited.

resolution_summary.note: DERIVED_ROM = a constant (group,slot) or (group, dir-indexed slot) read directly at a zz_004beb8_/zz_005f188_ call site inside the handler. INFERRED = handler routes to another handler / trampoline whose anim is known. INDIRECT = handler picks a STATE (via zz_005f00c_) not an anim; anim is one of the group0 locomotion slots downstream. UNRESOLVED = no bank-setter constant visible (deploy 0-3, guard-start 8, big-special 32/33).
